evidence_summary: Establish the mundane reality of a hot riverbank before disrupting it with the arrival of an impossible creature. The transition must move from static boredom to kinetic pursuit.

Alice sits bored by the riverbank with her sister. The tranquility is broken when a White Rabbit in a waistcoat runs past, checking a pocket watch, prompting Alice to chase it into a rabbit-hole under a hedge.
Alice sits idle by the sunny riverbank with her sister.
Alice plunges into the dark rabbit_hole_tunnel.
The White Rabbit runs past, prompting Alice to chase him into a hole.
